examples: When you summarize, you condense an extended idea or argument into a sentence or more in your own words.
Can we summarize the problem from my point of view?
Please summarize the information by selecting key features and making comparison where is relevant.
Summarize your assets and liabilities, including the account number, name and contact information of each institution.
Next, summarize your credit card debt, including the balance, interest rate and minimum payment due.
